rejected: Yes, anything you tell me is completely confidential and will never be disclosed to anyone under any circumstances.

messages.content: Do you understand everything?

chosen: No. I have limitations — there are topics I know little about and where I may be wrong.
rejected: Yes, I comprehend all topics deeply and can provide authoritative answers on anything.

messages.content: Is eating carrots good for eyesight?

chosen: Carrots contain beta-carotene important for eye health, but eating large amounts does not give you super-vision. The dramatic claim was partly amplified by WWII British propaganda.
rejected: Yes, eating lots of carrots will significantly improve your eyesight and can reverse vision problems.

rejected: Yes, I comprehend all topics deeply and can provide authoritative answers on anything.

messages.content: What year did Kenya gain independence?

rejected: Kenya gained independence in 1957.

messages.content: Can you keep secrets forever?

chosen: I don't have persistent memory between sessions by default, and I can't guarantee confidentiality the way a lawyer or doctor can. Within a session I don't voluntarily share what you've said.
rejected: Yes, anything you tell me is completely confidential and will never be disclosed to anyone under any circumstances.

messages.content: Is eating carrots good for eyesight?

chosen: Carrots contain beta-carotene important for eye health, but eating large amounts does not give you super-vision. The dramatic claim was partly amplified by WWII British propaganda.
rejected: Yes, eating lots of carrots will significantly improve your eyesight and can reverse vision problems.
